AddTbspAreaBlocking.clientToken: Idempotency token, no more than 64 characters
AddTbspAreaBlocking.ip: Protected object IP address of the DDoS enhanced protection package
AddTbspAreaBlocking.blockTime: Area blocking duration (unit: minutes), minimum 30, maximum 1440; required when adding fixed-duration area blocking
AddTbspAreaBlocking.blockType: Blocking type, either fixedDuration (fixed duration) or systemDetermines (system determined); defaults to fixedDuration if not specified
